title: AWS Marketplace: Agentic AI Solutions on AWS: Enterprise Agent Platform Implementation
search_path_label: 采购 / 招投标 / Marketplace 路径
full_text: # Agentic AI Solutions on AWS: Enterprise Agent Platform Implementation. Adastra's agentic AI solutions engagement designs and builds a modular, enterprise-grade AI agent platform on AWS that gives organizations a repeatable foundation for creating, deploying, and managing autonomous agents across business functions. Built on Amazon Bedrock Agents, Amazon Bedrock Flows, and AWS serverless infrastructure, the platform supports multi-agent collaboration, low-code agent creation, secure tool integration, and centralized governance, all within a cloud-native architecture managed through Terraform or CloudFormation. We then design and build a modular AI platform using key AWS serverless services including Amazon Bedrock Agents and Flows, with Terraform or CloudFormation for infrastructure automation. **Adastra: Your AWS Partner for Data, AI, and Cloud**. Adastra is an AWS Premier Consulting Partner with over 25 years of experience delivering data, AI, and cloud solutions across financial services, retail, manufacturing, and distribution. With deep expertise in Amazon Bedrock, multi-agent architectures, and cloud-native infrastructure, Adastra gives organizations a proven partner to move from AI experimentation to production-ready agentic operations. / score=0.353 / query=agent governance evals production rollout enterprise AI / intent=find_original_source / path=procurement_marketplace

# Agentic AI Solutions on AWS: Enterprise Agent Platform Implementation.

Adastra's agentic AI solutions engagement designs and builds a modular, enterprise-grade AI agent platform on AWS that gives organizations a repeatable foundation for creating, deploying, and managing autonomous agents across business functions.

Built on Amazon Bedrock Agents, Amazon Bedrock Flows, and AWS serverless infrastructure, the platform supports multi-agent collaboration, low-code agent creation, secure tool integration, and centralized governance, all within a cloud-native architecture managed through Terraform or CloudFormation.
We then design and build a modular AI platform using key AWS serverless services including Amazon Bedrock Agents and Flows, with Terraform or CloudFormation for infrastructure automation.
**Adastra: Your AWS Partner for Data, AI, and Cloud**.

# Agentic AI Solutions on AWS: Enterprise Agent Platform Implementation. Adastra's agentic AI solutions engagement designs and builds a modular, enterprise-grade AI agent platform on AWS that gives organizations a repeatable foundation for creating, deploying, and managing autonomous agents across business functions. Built on Amazon Bedrock Agents, Amazon Bedrock Flows, and AWS serverless infrastructure, the platform supports multi-agent collaboration, low-code agent creation, secure tool integration, and centralized governance, all within a cloud-native architecture managed through Terraform or CloudFormation. We then design and build a modular AI platform using key AWS serverless services including Amazon Bedrock Agents and Flows, with Terraform or CloudFormation for infrastructure automation. **Adastra: Your AWS Partner for Data, AI, and Cloud**. Adastra is an AWS Premier Consulting Partner with over 25 years of experience delivering data, AI, and cloud solutions across financial services, retail, manufacturing, and distribution.
